positive: A stylized, maximalist jungle scene composed of interconnected flora and fauna, designed for a circular crop. The main subject is a central, glowing mystical lotus blossom framed by dense, contrasting jungle foliage. Include abstract elements like glowing fireflies, intricate filigree vines, and stylized tropical birds mid-flight. The style should be neo-art deco botanical illustration, combining the precision of vintage etching with the vibrancy of modern pop-art colors. Use a limited palette dominated by emerald green, sapphire blue, deep amethyst purple, and accented by gold leaf textures. The composition must maintain strong silhouettes, clean lines, and high contrast against a solid, complementary background field. The artwork must look seamless and suitable for repeating textile pattern.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, blur, noise, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, monochrome, realistic photo, photographic, jpeg artifacts, low detail, cropped, out of frame
